fieldsPerHazard.label: Severity
fieldsPerHazard.help: Select the severity of the harm that could result if the hazard occurs.

fieldsPerHazard.label: Probability of Occurrence
fieldsPerHazard.help: Select how often the hazardous event is expected to occur under current controls.

fieldsPerHazard.label: Exposure
fieldsPerHazard.help: Select how often the product or people are exposed to the hazard.

fieldsPerHazard.label: Detectability
fieldsPerHazard.help: Select how likely the hazard is to be detected before it causes harm.

fieldsPerHazard.label: Control Effectiveness
fieldsPerHazard.help: Select how effective existing controls are at reducing the hazard.

fieldsPerHazard.label: Contextual selectors
fieldsPerHazard.help: Select all contextual tags that apply to refine defaults and traceability.

fieldsPerHazard.label: Quick defaults
fieldsPerHazard.help: Apply curated default selections for this hazard based on contextual tags.

liveFeedback.displayText: Shows numeric values and a one-line plain English interpretation for the current selections.
